metadata.notes: Initial parity matrix based on prompt requirements and current repo behavior.

epics.title: Security + Tenancy
epics.description: Close security and isolation gaps to meet production-grade SaaS expectations.

tasks.title: Harden tenant isolation test coverage across all core entities
tasks.problemStatement: Tenant isolation coverage is now verified across expanded core entity surfaces, including retention/disposition workflows, trust reconciliation/LEDES entities, and AI style pack administration.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Tenant isolation tests must be present and enforced server-side.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test suites for cross-tenant access attempts on contacts, matters, documents, billing, imports, exports, and AI endpoints.
All multi-tenant tests fail if organization scoping is removed.
CI blocks merges when tenant isolation tests fail.
tasks.apiImpact: No public API change; stricter test guarantees.
tasks.securityImpact: Prevents data leakage between firms.
definitionOfDone: Security tenant-isolation suite covers newly added billing/documents/AI entities and passes in CI.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/tenant-isolation-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement upload malware scanning provider integration
tasks.promptSection: SECURITY REQUIREMENTS / Malware scanning hook for uploads
tasks.problemStatement: Current malware scanner is a stub and always returns clean.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Malware scanning hook required for uploads.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrate a real scanner (e.g., ClamAV sidecar or SaaS API).
Reject infected uploads and log scan outcomes.
Add integration test with simulated infected payload flow.
tasks.apiImpact: Upload endpoints return explicit scan failure errors.
tasks.securityImpact: Prevents malicious file ingestion.
definitionOfDone: Scanner configurable via env.
Observed blocking behavior in tests and staging runbook.

tasks.title: Implement encrypted OAuth token storage with key management
tasks.promptSection: API & INTEGRATIONS / Integration connections table storing OAuth tokens encrypted
tasks.problemStatement: Token encryption-at-rest, decrypt-on-read usage, and key rotation guidance/tests are implemented.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: OAuth tokens must be stored encrypted.
acceptanceCriteria: Encrypt access/refresh tokens with managed key before DB write.
Decrypt only at use-time in connector services.
Add key-rotation migration strategy and tests.
tasks.apiImpact: No endpoint shape changes; storage semantics updated.
tasks.securityImpact: Reduces credential exposure risk.
definitionOfDone: Encryption wrapper merged with tests.
Key rotation documented.

epics.title: Data Model Completeness
epics.description: Ensure Prisma and domain entities fully cover prompt object model requirements.

tasks.title: Validate all required entities and relation semantics against prompt
tasks.problemStatement: Prisma model coverage and high-risk schema semantics are now verified by executable conformance tests plus an explicit gap register for non-REQ-DATA-001 follow-on work.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Minimum entities and capabilities cannot be omitted.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate schema checklist mapping every prompt entity to model/table and key relations.
Open explicit gap issues per missing/partial entity behavior.
Attach checklist artifact in docs.
tasks.apiImpact: Potential follow-on migrations only.
tasks.securityImpact: Improves data integrity and access policy enforcement confidence.
definitionOfDone: Schema conformance suite committed at apps/api/test/schema-conformance.spec.ts and passing in CI.
Verification artifact committed at docs/parity/data-model-conformance-verification.md.
Checklist remains committed at docs/parity/data-model-checklist.md with explicit open-gap requirement links.

tasks.title: Complete ABAC policy abstraction for matter-level ethical walls
tasks.problemStatement: Ethical wall logic exists but policy representation is not fully extensible.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: AccessPolicy / ABAC hooks required for ethical wall controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Define reusable policy evaluation contract with reason codes.
Cover deny-list + team restrictions + future policy composition.
Add unit and integration tests for policy combinations.
tasks.apiImpact: Internal policy service contract introduced.
tasks.securityImpact: Reduces accidental bypass risks.
definitionOfDone: Policy engine contract documented and tested.

tasks.title: Add pgvector-backed similarity retrieval path for source chunks
tasks.problemStatement: Embeddings are stored but retrieval flow should explicitly support vector similarity queries.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: RAG via pgvector required.
acceptanceCriteria: Enable vector index + query path for matter-scoped retrieval.
Fallback behavior documented when embeddings unavailable.
Benchmark and verify top-k retrieval quality.
tasks.apiImpact: AI tool internals updated for retrieval.
tasks.securityImpact: Maintains matter-scoped data boundaries in retrieval.
definitionOfDone: RAG retrieval uses vector similarity in production path.

epics.title: Import/Export Portability
epics.description: Deliver migration parity for inbound and outbound data portability.

tasks.title: Finalize MyCase ZIP importer field coverage and error mapping
tasks.promptSection: MVP Importers / MyCase Full Backup Import
tasks.problemStatement: MyCase ZIP importer coverage is now verification-hardened with dependency-order safety checks, warning-context assertions for unlinked communications, and external-reference lineage/raw-payload integrity validation.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Map contacts, cases, tasks, calendar, invoices/payments, time, notes/messages where possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete mapping coverage matrix for MyCase CSV files.
ImportItem warnings/errors capture row-level mapping context.
Round-trip fixture updated and passing.
tasks.apiImpact: Import result payload contains richer warning structures.
tasks.securityImpact: No material security impact.
definitionOfDone: Coverage matrix + verification artifact committed.
MyCase importer regression suite asserts order safety, warning context, and external reference lineage.
Verification evidence documented in docs/parity/mycase-import-verification.md.

tasks.title: Finalize Clio CSV/XLSX template importer coverage
tasks.promptSection: MVP Importers / Clio Migration Template Import
tasks.problemStatement: Clio CSV/XLSX importer verification is hardened with executable checks for source-entity lineage, row-level unresolved-reference diagnostics, and cross-sheet external-reference payload integrity.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Map contacts, matters, tasks, calendar, activities/time entries, notes, phone logs/emails where available.
acceptanceCriteria: All documented Clio template tabs mapped or explicitly skipped with warnings.
XLSX and CSV parity test fixtures pass.
Import summary clearly identifies unmapped columns.
tasks.apiImpact: Import summaries expanded.
tasks.securityImpact: No material security impact.
definitionOfDone: Importer acceptance tests cover complete template spectrum with row-level error/warning context.
Communication source lineage is preserved for CSV/XLSX with source file, source entity, and source row number metadata.
XLSX unresolved-reference diagnostics include workbook-sheet source context and row numbers.
Verification artifact published at docs/parity/clio-import-verification.md.

tasks.title: Build user-confirm merge workflow for dedupe suggestions
tasks.promptSection: Import Framework / Dedupe engine + user-confirm merge UI
tasks.problemStatement: Dedupe merge workflow is verification-hardened with self-merge guardrails, expanded referential-integrity reassignment coverage, and explicit reviewer-cancel UI protections for merge actions.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Dedupe engine with fuzzy matching and user-confirm merge UI required.
acceptanceCriteria: UI presents duplicate candidates with confidence and field diff.
User can merge/ignore/defer; actions audit logged.
Merge tests verify referential integrity.
tasks.apiImpact: New merge decision endpoints and payloads.
tasks.securityImpact: Audit log and change traceability required.
definitionOfDone: Dedupe confirmation flow includes explicit reviewer confirmation gate and cancel-safe behavior.
Merge service rejects self-referential merges/decisions, reassigns all high-risk contact references, and prunes self-referential relationship rows created during reassignment.
Verification artifact published at docs/parity/dedupe-merge-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement full backup export package conformance checks
tasks.problemStatement: Full-backup export is now verification-hardened with deterministic manifest integrity checks (duplicate path/documentVersion detection and placeholder/path consistency) in addition to required file/column/schema validation.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: ZIP with CSVs per entity and docs manifest; data dictionary page.
acceptanceCriteria: Export output validated against documented manifest schema.
CSV set includes required entities/custom fields.
Automated round-trip integrity test confirms import/export coherence.
tasks.apiImpact: Export endpoint emits validated package metadata.
tasks.securityImpact: Signed export access and audit logging maintained.
definitionOfDone: Round-trip export/import verification published.
Conformance validator rejects duplicate manifest documentVersion/path rows and placeholder/path mismatches with explicit issue codes.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/export-conformance.md.

epics.title: Contacts + Matters + Participants
epics.description: Achieve workflow completeness for case-centric legal operations objects.

tasks.title: Complete participant role configurability and side semantics coverage
tasks.problemStatement: Participant-role semantics are now verified with explicit edge-case regression coverage for counsel/non-counsel constraints, self-reference guards, side/isPrimary overrides, and full category matrix coverage.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Support opposing counsel, adjusters, insurer, mediator, judge, expert, inspector, etc.
acceptanceCriteria: Participant role definitions configurable per org.
Validation for represented-by and law-firm link semantics.
Role-specific tests cover all listed participant categories.
tasks.apiImpact: Role definition endpoints and validation rules strengthened.
tasks.securityImpact: Matter access checks remain enforced on participant mutations.
definitionOfDone: Matter participant regression suite covers role lookup failures, counsel constraints, and self-reference guards.
Prompt category matrix coverage remains green across all required participant roles.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/matter-participant-role-verification.md.

tasks.title: Enhance contact relationship graph visualization and filtering
tasks.problemStatement: Contacts graph/filter workflows are verification-hardened with explicit controller parsing support for both CSV and repeated query parameters (include/exclude tags + relationship types), while preserving compound filters and inline dedupe indicators.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: People/org contacts with relationship graph and tags/filters.
acceptanceCriteria: Graph view supports relationship-type filters and search.
Tag filters support compound conditions.
Dedupe suggestion indicators surfaced directly in contacts UI.
tasks.apiImpact: Contacts list/graph endpoints now support compound filter params (include/exclude tags, tag mode, relationship type, search).
tasks.securityImpact: Tenant and permission checks enforced for graph API.
definitionOfDone: Contacts controller regression suite verifies CSV + repeated-query parsing for include/exclude tags and relationship types, plus invalid tag-mode fallback behavior.
Contacts graph and filtering UI/API path is covered by API + web regression tests and documented in docs/parity/contacts-graph-filtering.md.

tasks.title: Complete construction litigation intake wizard domain coverage
tasks.promptSection: Construction litigation domain extensions + intake wizard
tasks.problemStatement: Intake wizard coverage is now verified with API + web regression checks for required domain validation gates, draft save/resume behavior, full section payload composition, and fallback contact resolution for lien/insurance/expert records.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Intake wizard must populate property, contract, defects, damages, lien, insurance, expert sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Wizard captures all required domain sections with validation.
Draft-save and resume behavior implemented.
Matter dashboard shows domain section completeness indicators.
tasks.apiImpact: Potential intake payload schema expansion.
tasks.securityImpact: Field-level PII protections retained.
definitionOfDone: API regression suite covers required intake validation errors, domain persistence, draft lifecycle, and fallback contact generation semantics.
Web regression suite validates full intake payload composition plus draft resume repopulation across domain sections.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/intake-wizard-domain-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement advanced conflict rule profiles and resolution workflows
tasks.promptSection: CRM / ConflictCheckResult + advanced conflict rule profiles
tasks.problemStatement: Conflict profile configuration, weighted scoring checks, recommendation output, and attorney resolution audit workflow are now implemented across admin API + UI.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Advanced conflict rules should support profile-based matching, relationship-aware scoring, and logged attorney override decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create conflict rule profiles with weighted match criteria and scope by practice area/matter type.
Conflict checks return rule-level hits, scores, and escalation recommendation (clear/warn/block).
Attorney resolution decisions require rationale and are stored in an auditable history.
tasks.apiImpact: Added admin conflict rule profile CRUD, conflict check execution/list, and resolution endpoints with result payload scoring and resolution history fields.
tasks.securityImpact: Reduces conflict-of-interest risk and improves defensible compliance records.
definitionOfDone: Advanced conflict profile CRUD, scoring checks, and resolution audit tests are passing with evidence in docs/parity/conflict-rule-profiles.md.

tasks.title: Implement jurisdictional deadline rules packs and rule selection flow
tasks.promptSection: Calendar / DeadlineRuleTemplate + Phase 2 advanced docket rules packs
tasks.problemStatement: Jurisdiction/court/procedure deadline rules packs with versioning, preview-before-apply flow, and override governance are now implemented across API + matter dashboard UI.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Jurisdictional deadline rules packs should be versioned and selectable by jurisdiction/court/procedure with attorney override controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Define rules-pack entities keyed by jurisdiction, court, and procedure with effective date versioning.
Matter deadline calculator can select a pack and produce previewed deadlines before commit.
Override actions require reason capture and are audit logged.
tasks.apiImpact: Deadline APIs gain rules-pack selection and preview/apply endpoints.
tasks.securityImpact: No direct confidentiality change; improves litigation deadline reliability and auditability.
definitionOfDone: Rules-pack CRUD and deadline preview/apply flows are covered by API + web tests with evidence in docs/parity/deadline-rules-packs.md.

epics.title: Communications + Documents
epics.description: Close comms/document parity and integration workflows.

tasks.title: Implement production email/SMS providers behind provider interface
tasks.promptSection: Email/SMS provider interfaces + stub provider in MVP
tasks.problemStatement: Production email/SMS providers are now verified with retry-policy guardrails, deterministic non-retryable handling, and persisted delivery provenance.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Provider interfaces exist; MVP includes stub, but production providers needed for parity.
acceptanceCriteria: Add configurable provider adapters (e.g., SendGrid, Twilio).
Delivery status and provider message IDs persisted.
Failure/retry policy covered in tests.
tasks.apiImpact: Message send endpoints include delivery metadata.
tasks.securityImpact: Secrets managed via environment and encryption.
definitionOfDone: Provider dispatch tests verify retryable vs non-retryable handling and invalid retry env fallback behavior.
Outbound delivery metadata and audit trails remain validated in communications delivery tests.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/communications-provider-adapters.md.

tasks.title: Complete communication search relevance and indexing strategy
tasks.problemStatement: Communications search relevance/indexing is now verified with ranked full-text behavior, wildcard-safe fallback matching, and matter-scope/query-normalization guardrails.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Search communications by keyword.
acceptanceCriteria: Add indexed tsvector strategy with migration.
Sort by relevance and date.
Load/performance test for expected message volume.
tasks.apiImpact: Search responses include rank score.
tasks.securityImpact: Search remains tenant-scoped.
definitionOfDone: Search tests verify ranked full-text ordering, fallback substring behavior, and wildcard escaping in fallback patterns.
Matter-scoped search authorization and SQL matter-filter coverage are verified.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/communications-search-indexing.md.

tasks.title: Expand document automation coverage for merge fields and generated outputs
tasks.problemStatement: Document automation is now verified with strict template governance, merge patch sanitization, and generated artifact provenance/audit coverage.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: DOCX template merge from matter/contact/custom fields and PDF generation for invoices/finalized letters.
acceptanceCriteria: Merge context supports matter/contact/custom field graph.
Template validation catches missing placeholders before generation.
Generated artifact metadata and provenance logged.
tasks.apiImpact: Template merge endpoint payload/response enriched.
tasks.securityImpact: Generated docs inherit confidentiality controls.
definitionOfDone: Template merge tests verify strict validation behavior, unsupported template-type rejection, and merge patch sanitization controls.
Generated PDF coverage verifies provenance metadata and document.pdf.generated audit events.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/document-automation-coverage.md.

tasks.title: Implement document retention policies with legal hold workflow
tasks.promptSection: Documents / Evidence + Security controls for retention/legal hold
tasks.problemStatement: Retention policy lifecycle, legal hold controls, and approval-gated disposition workflows are now implemented across API + documents UI.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Support retention policy assignment, legal hold precedence, disposition queue, and auditable retention actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create retention policy model with scope, trigger, and disposition rules.
Legal hold state blocks disposition and requires explicit release workflow.
Disposition events are approval-gated and fully audit logged.
tasks.apiImpact: Document management APIs gain retention policy assignment and disposition queue endpoints.
tasks.securityImpact: Improves defensible records governance and prevents unauthorized deletion.
definitionOfDone: Retention + legal hold + disposition lifecycle workflows are covered by API/Web tests with evidence in docs/parity/document-retention-workflows.md.

epics.title: Billing + Trust + Payments
epics.description: Complete billing and trust workflows with compliance-oriented reporting.

tasks.title: Finalize Stripe payment flow lifecycle and webhook reconciliation
tasks.promptSection: Billing & Trust / Stripe Checkout pay link
tasks.problemStatement: Stripe checkout + reconciliation is now verified with event-level idempotency, signature-path coverage, and deterministic invoice status transition tests.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Stripe Checkout pay link required with payments tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook handling reconciles checkout completion and payment state.
Idempotency handling for duplicate webhook deliveries.
Invoice balance transitions tested end-to-end.
tasks.apiImpact: Webhook endpoint and payment status updates expanded.
tasks.securityImpact: Webhook signature verification required.
definitionOfDone: Stripe lifecycle tests cover checkout metadata propagation, duplicate webhook behavior by payment intent and event ID, payment_intent.succeeded paid transitions, and webhook signature verification.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/billing-stripe-reconciliation-verification.md.

tasks.title: Complete trust accounting reports and ledger invariants
tasks.promptSection: Billing & Trust / Trust ledger entries and basic trust reporting
tasks.problemStatement: Trust invariants and reporting are now verified with atomic transfer updates, transfer-aware reconciliation delta logic, and expanded regression coverage.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Trust ledger and basic trust reporting required.
acceptanceCriteria: Matter and account-level trust balance reports implemented.
Invariant checks prevent negative trust balance unless explicitly allowed by policy.
Audit logs emitted for trust adjustments.
tasks.apiImpact: Trust report endpoints expanded.
tasks.securityImpact: Financial data integrity improved.
definitionOfDone: Trust regression tests cover transfer atomicity, reconciliation mismatch detection, and transfer in/out delta correctness.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/billing-trust-ledger-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement trust reconciliation workflows with discrepancy resolution
tasks.problemStatement: Trust reconciliation workflows are implemented with run lifecycle management, discrepancy resolution, and completion sign-off controls.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Trust reconciliation should support statement-period runs, discrepancy tracking, resolution notes, and sign-off evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reconciliation run entities with lifecycle states (draft, in_review, completed).
System records discrepancy records with reason codes and resolution outcome.
Completed reconciliation requires sign-off and emits audit events.
tasks.apiImpact: New reconciliation run/discrepancy endpoints and reporting payload fields.
tasks.securityImpact: Improves financial controls and traceability for trust account compliance.
definitionOfDone: Reconciliation workflows are tested end-to-end with deterministic trust ledger fixtures and documented in docs/parity/trust-reconciliation-workflows.md.

tasks.title: Implement LEDES/UTBMS export jobs with validation profiles
tasks.problemStatement: LEDES export profiles and jobs are implemented with profile-based validation, checksum metadata, and signed artifact download flow.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Provide executable LEDES export jobs, validation statuses, and downloadable LEDES outputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add LEDES export profile and export job entities with format selection and validation status.
Validation rejects incomplete required billing/task code data before export.
Export job writes output artifact and records checksum + audit metadata.
tasks.apiImpact: Billing APIs gain LEDES export job create/status/download endpoints.
tasks.securityImpact: Billing exports remain tenant-scoped and audit logged.
definitionOfDone: LEDES profile/job workflows are covered by API/Web tests and documented in docs/parity/ledes-export-workflows.md.

epics.title: Client Portal
epics.description: Bring portal capabilities to parity with secure client collaboration requirements.

tasks.title: Implement secure portal attachments in message workflow
tasks.promptSection: Client Portal / Secure messaging with attachments
tasks.problemStatement: Portal attachment workflow is verification-hardened with disposed-document guardrails, snapshot attachment filtering, and explicit audit coverage for link/download issuance actions.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Secure messaging with attachments required for clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Clients can upload attachments to portal threads.
Attachment access restricted by portal entitlement and expiry.
Audit events record all client attachment actions.
tasks.apiImpact: Portal messaging endpoints support attachment metadata.
tasks.securityImpact: Strict access controls and signed download URLs required.
definitionOfDone: Portal attachment security tests pass across upload/link/download paths, including disposed-document denial checks.
Portal snapshot output excludes non-shared/disposed attachment records defensively.
Attachment-link and download URL issuance actions are auditable.
Verification artifact published at docs/parity/portal-attachments-verification.md.

tasks.title: Replace e-sign stub with provider abstraction implementation
tasks.problemStatement: Portal e-sign flow is verification-hardened with provider abstraction lifecycle coverage, idempotent webhook handling, invalid-signature rejection, and portal-side status refresh assertions.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: E-sign interface required; stub acceptable for MVP but parity backlog needs production-ready integration path.
acceptanceCriteria: Provider abstraction supports create envelope, status polling, webhook callback.
Envelope lifecycle state transitions persisted and surfaced in portal.
Fallback stub remains available for local development.
tasks.apiImpact: Portal endpoints now include envelope list/status refresh and provider-specific webhook callback processing.
tasks.securityImpact: Signature payload integrity and webhook auth required.
definitionOfDone: Sandbox provider flow and signed webhook lifecycle tests are passing with idempotency + invalid-signature verification coverage.
Portal UI tests confirm envelope refresh updates surfaced lifecycle status.
Verification artifact is documented at docs/parity/esign-provider-abstraction.md.

epics.title: AI Workspace + Governance
epics.description: Complete AI workforce tools and governance controls required by prompt.

tasks.title: Implement source-cited deadline extraction side-by-side evidence UI
tasks.promptSection: AI Workspace / Deadline extraction with side-by-side excerpt
tasks.problemStatement: Deadline extraction UX, server-side confirmation guardrails, and auditable confirmation events are now verified end-to-end with regression coverage.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Must show side-by-side excerpt for each extracted date and require confirmation before creating tasks/events.
acceptanceCriteria: UI displays each extracted deadline with source excerpt and chunk link.
No task/event creation until user explicitly confirms row selection.
Confirmation action logged in audit trail.
tasks.apiImpact: Artifact response includes structured evidence payload.
tasks.securityImpact: Preserves review-required governance controls.
definitionOfDone: Deadline confirmation UX validated with acceptance tests.
Confirmation validation + audit-trail tests are passing and documented in docs/parity/ai-deadline-confirmation-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement prompt injection defense hardening for ingestion pipeline
tasks.promptSection: AI Governance / Red-team prompt injection defenses
tasks.problemStatement: Ingestion hardening now has defense-in-depth verification with citation-policy enforcement, quarantined chunk metadata, audit events, and adversarial regression coverage.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Isolate system prompts, filter malicious instructions, always cite sources used.
acceptanceCriteria: Ingestion pipeline flags and quarantines high-risk instruction patterns.
Generation path enforces citation requirement for substantive claims.
Security tests include adversarial doc fixtures.
tasks.apiImpact: AI job outputs include policy compliance metadata.
tasks.securityImpact: Reduces prompt injection risk and hallucination blast radius.
definitionOfDone: AI security tests verify quarantine metadata, blocked-chunk exclusion, and citation-policy enforcement audit events.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/ai-ingestion-security-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement style pack management with source document governance
tasks.problemStatement: Style pack governance is verification-hardened with detach-path matter-access enforcement and richer detached-source provenance in audit metadata, in addition to existing style-pack selection provenance.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Firm style packs should inform drafting tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin UI to create/update style packs and attach source docs.
AI job payload can select style pack.
Draft outputs record selected style pack in provenance.
tasks.apiImpact: AI create job schema may include stylePackId.
tasks.securityImpact: No major change beyond existing org scope checks.
definitionOfDone: Style pack assignment is visible in AI artifact + execution provenance metadata.
Style pack source detach path enforces matter-access checks and auditable document/matter metadata.
Verification artifact published at docs/parity/style-pack-verification.md.

epics.title: Integrations + Webhooks
epics.description: Replace connector stubs with production-grade integration flows.

tasks.title: Implement Clio connector OAuth + incremental sync + webhook subscription
tasks.problemStatement: Clio OAuth callback validation, refresh-grant token lifecycle, incremental idempotent sync checkpoints, and webhook subscription registration paths are now covered by connector + integration orchestration regression suites.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Connector must support OAuth, incremental sync, webhook subscriptions with idempotency keys.
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth handshake and token refresh implemented.
Incremental cursor sync persists checkpoints.
Webhook subscriptions registered and delivery validated.
tasks.apiImpact: Integration setup endpoints expanded for OAuth lifecycle.
tasks.securityImpact: Token encryption and callback validation required.
definitionOfDone: Connector refresh grant + webhook registration paths covered in clio.connector.spec.ts.
OAuth callback validation/idempotent sync orchestration covered in integrations.spec.ts.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/clio-connector-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement MyCase connector OAuth + incremental sync + webhook subscription
tasks.problemStatement: MyCase OAuth callback validation, refresh-grant token lifecycle, incremental idempotent sync checkpoints, and webhook subscription registration paths are now covered by connector + integration orchestration tests.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Connector must support incremental sync + webhooks where available.
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth and refresh flow implemented.
Incremental sync with idempotency key support.
Webhook event ingestion path covered by tests.
tasks.apiImpact: Integration management API extended.
tasks.securityImpact: Credentials protected and webhook auth enforced.
definitionOfDone: Connector refresh grant + webhook registration paths covered in mycase.connector.spec.ts.
OAuth callback validation/idempotent sync orchestration covered in integrations.spec.ts.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/mycase-connector-verification.md.

tasks.title: Implement Filevine and PracticePanther connector production adapters
tasks.problemStatement: Filevine and PracticePanther connectors are verification-hardened for live/scaffold incremental pulls and webhook subscription registration, including provider error surfacing and external-subscription-id extraction.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Provide connector structure with incremental sync and webhook support.
acceptanceCriteria: At minimum, authenticated pull sync for core entities.
Idempotent sync run records and cursor checkpoints.
Clear unsupported capability warnings where provider APIs differ.
tasks.apiImpact: Connector adapters expanded; no breaking public API planned.
tasks.securityImpact: Same token/webhook security controls applied.
definitionOfDone: Connector regression suite verifies live/scaffold sync behavior, token requirements, and webhook registration failure handling for Filevine + PracticePanther.
Optional provider webhook registration URLs are supported via env/config overrides and return provider external IDs when available.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/filevine-practicepanther-connector-verification.md.

epics.title: Testing + Reliability + Ops
epics.description: Strengthen release confidence, CI policy enforcement, and operational controls.

tasks.title: Add web application automated test suite for critical workflows
tasks.problemStatement: Web suite now includes broad page coverage plus a multi-surface smoke journey spanning sign-in, dashboard, matter creation, and portal messaging.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Tests should verify core auth/RBAC/matter/document/import/AI flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Add component/integration tests for login, dashboard, matter screens, and portal flows.
Add smoke e2e test for primary user journey.
CI runs web tests and blocks on failure.
tasks.apiImpact: No API changes required.
tasks.securityImpact: Reduces regression risk in permission boundaries.
definitionOfDone: Web test command implemented and required in CI.
Smoke journey regression is tracked in docs/parity artifacts.

tasks.title: Document deployment runbook and operational SLOs
tasks.problemStatement: Operations documentation is now verification-hardened with executable checks that enforce required runbook sections, baseline SLO targets, and README/parity linkage integrity.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Production-ready system requires clear operational playbooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create runbook for deploy, rollback, migrations, and incident response.
Define baseline SLOs and key health metrics.
Add healthcheck and startup readiness checks to deployment guidance.
tasks.apiImpact: No endpoint changes.
tasks.securityImpact: Improves incident response posture.
definitionOfDone: Runbook committed at docs/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md, linked from README, and evidenced in docs/parity/ops-runbook-slos.md.
Automated regression test validates required runbook sections, baseline SLO targets, and README/parity linkage.

tasks.title: Enforce Linear key branch/PR policy in CI
tasks.promptSection: Backlog governance / strict issue key linkage
tasks.problemStatement: Linear-key governance is verification-hardened with executable checks that guard workflow regex enforcement and required PR template metadata sections.
tasks.requirementExcerpt: Branch and PR title must include Linear key for auto-linking.
acceptanceCriteria: CI check fails on non-compliant branch names.
CI check fails on PR titles missing Linear key.
PR template enforces requirement metadata.
tasks.apiImpact: No API change.
tasks.securityImpact: Improves change traceability and auditability.
definitionOfDone: Policy workflow active on all PRs.
Automated governance test verifies workflow regex/policy guards and required PR template sections.
Verification artifact documented at docs/parity/pr-linear-policy-verification.md.
